Wait, let me reconsider. The player is the blue/charcoal pattern. Let me reconsider. The player didn't move. The player is the blue/charcoal pattern didn't move. But the green object inside the gray box moved right.
This suggests that pressing RIGHT caused the green object to move right, not the player character.
So maybe the player character is actually the green square (node 34) and the gray box (node 32) contains it. The green square moved right by 1 column.
So the goal might be controlling the green square, not the blue/charcoal pattern.
